description:
There is no income requirement for food pantry services. All are welcome. Everything is free. Please bring personal identification with you and proof of household size if you have it.

CHASI is using Plentiful to improve your service and to make it easier for you to find other pantries to meet your needs. Text the word “FOOD” to PANTRY (726-879) from any phone to get the Plentiful app, or bring your ID and we’ll help you connect!
name: CHASI MFP- Ocean Ave & Drury Ave

Through our Mobile Market, we distribute free fruits and vegetables, to our community twice each month
Must be a Staten Island resident to receive food

Eligible if you participate in programs at the Stapleton Houses Senior Center or live in the Berry, Cassidy Coles, New Lane, Richmond Terrace, South Beach,or Stapleton NYCHA Houses or residents of 10301, 10304, 10305, or 10310
name: City Harvest Mobile Market - The Stapleton
